concerns.text: Task T011 and T014a attempt to implement FR-001 (download from NREL/Zenodo) but the Spec and Plan explicitly state no verified URL exists yet (Plan: 'Critical Constraint: blocked until verified source identified'). The tasks describe fetching from 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nrel/...' or 'verified Zenodo DOI' which are placeholders. There is no task to perform the 'Data Feasibility Check' (Plan: Computational Task Ordering #1) to identify/verify the source before attempting download. Without a task to resolve the data source, FR-001 cannot be satisfied.

FR-008 requires flagging samples where bulk EDS correlates with surface PCE without depth validation, and optionally excluding them if 'sensitivity analysis indicates high sensitivity'. Task T031b implements the sensitivity analysis, but no task exists to define the quantitative threshold for 'high sensitivity' or the specific exclusion logic based on that threshold. The spec admits this is undefined ('spec fails to define the quantitative threshold'). Consequently, the implementation of the exclusion logic mandated by FR-008 is incomplete.

SC-004 requires measuring data ingestion success rate against a 'deferred' project constraint. Task T033 calculates statistical power and flags if N < 30, but there is no task to calculate or report the 'ingestion success rate' metric itself (e.g., 'N_processed / N_requested') as required by SC-004 and FR-001's success rate requirement. The report generation task T032 lists fields but does not explicitly include the ingestion success rate calculation logic.

Task T014a ('Implement ... to save raw EDS maps ... without modification') duplicates the logic of T011 ('...saving raw files to data/raw/'). T014a is redundant and fragments the ownership of the raw data ingestion step, creating ambiguity. T011 already covers the saving of raw files; T014a should be removed or merged to avoid conflicting implementations of the same requirement.

Task T031a ('Implement exclusion logic ... to remove samples flagged by T023') and Task T034 ('Implement ... to consume validation_flag ... and depth_flag, filtering out mismatched samples') appear to implement the same filtering logic for FR-007 and FR-008. T034 is listed as a dependency for correlation calculation, while T031a is part of sensitivity analysis. This creates a split in the filtering responsibility without clear separation, risking double-filtering or missed samples.
